package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for http_status_ignored_before_decode: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Response decoding or body consumption that happens without an observed StatusCode check.
type CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeModel
}

type CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecode(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecodeDTO) error {
    focus := "http_status_ignored_before_decode"
    _ = focus
    resp, _ := http.Get(input)
    io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
    http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive := map[string]int{"http": 1, "status": 2, "ignored": 3, "before": 4, "decode": 5}
    http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_positive_0 := http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_positive_0
    status_positive_1 := http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive["status"] + len(input)
    _ = status_positive_1
    ignored_positive_2 := http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive["ignored"] + len(input)
    _ = ignored_positive_2
    before_positive_3 := http_status_ignored_before_decode_positive["before"] + len(input)
    _ = before_positive_3
    decode_positive_4 := fmt.Sprintf("decode:%s", input)
    _ = decode_positive_4
    return nil
}
